subcodes.first_line: O thou martyr, son of the martyr! O thou who art firm and steadfast in God's ancient Covenant and Testament! O thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الشهید ابن الشهید ایها الثابت الراسخ علی عهد الله و میثاقه القدیم ایها
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @growth of the Cause, @call to action, @firmness in the Covenant
